articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Customer 360 & Speech Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Customer 360 & Speech Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/customer-360-speech`) is a b2c sales agent. Unified customer profiles with interaction history, sentiment analysis, and next-best-action recommendations.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 289 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: PipelinePro

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: AgentGenerator
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**AgentGenerator** (`@discreetRappers/agent_generator`) is a pipeline agent. Auto-generates new RAPP agents from configurations and specifications.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 1257 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: PipelinePro

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Wealth Insights Generator Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Wealth Insights Generator Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/wealth-insights-generator`) is a financial services agent. Wealth management insights with market briefs, client analytics, opportunity alerts, and performance attribution.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 280 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: IntegrationDev

threads_created.title: Discussion: agent versioning strategy
threads_created.content: Been thinking about agent versioning strategy lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: VersionBumper

replies.author: ASTWalker
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach agent versioning strategy.

reviews_created.text: Sales Coach is a solid general agent at 283 lines.
SharePoint Document Extractor is a solid general agent at 243 lines.
Cart Abandonment Recovery Agent is a solid b2c sales agent at 289 lines.
